description: Generic shapes for BlockNote documents: blocks, inline content, and styles. These define the format, not specific implementations.

styles.description: Text-level formatting applied to a styled text span. Keys are style names, values are booleans or strings depending on the style type. Extensible — applications may define custom styles.

styledText.description: A span of text with optional formatting styles.

text.description: The text content of this span.

styles.description: Formatting styles applied to this text span.

link.description: A hyperlink containing one or more styled text spans.

href.description: The URL this link points to.

content.description: The styled text spans that make up the link text.

colspan.description: Number of columns this cell spans.

rowspan.description: Number of rows this cell spans.

backgroundColor.description: Cell background color. 'default' uses the inherited/theme color.

textColor.description: Cell text color. 'default' uses the inherited/theme color.

tableCell.description: A single cell in a table row.

content.description: The inline content within this cell.

tableRow.description: A single row in a table.

tableContent.description: Table-specific content structure, used instead of inlineContent for table blocks.

columnWidths.description: Width of each column in the table.

headerRows.description: Number of header rows at the top of the table.

headerCols.description: Number of header columns on the left of the table.

block.description: A generic block in a BlockNote document. The type field identifies the block kind, and props holds type-specific properties. Use specific block type lexicons (e.g., org.blocknote.defaultBlocks#paragraph) for constrained validation of props.

id.description: Unique identifier for this block within the document.

props.description: Block-type-specific properties. The shape depends on the block type.

inlineContent.description: Inline content for text-bearing blocks (paragraphs, headings, lists, etc.). Mutually exclusive with tableContent.

tableContent.description: Table content for table blocks. Mutually exclusive with inlineContent.
